changelog:
VOCAL COMMAND V5.4:
- [COMMS] PTT Audio Logs: Integrated Push-To-Talk Walkie-Talkie feature for E2E Direct Messages and Public Timeline using MediaRecorder API.
- [UI] Tactical Squelch: Added native Web Audio API white noise generator for realistic radio squelch effects.
- [UI] Retro Audio Player: Redesigned audio attachments into interactive, retro-military playback buttons.
